welcome.title: Welcome back
welcome.body: Start with a check-in or open a tool.

urge.intensityLabel: How strong is the urge, right now?

crisis.headline: You are not alone.
crisis.body: If you are in crisis, please reach out. The numbers below are free and confidential.

hero.headline: Support for the moments between sessions.
hero.sub: Evidence-based coping tools, private by design, with you when you need them.

pricing.title: Simple, fair pricing
pricing.freeSub: Core coping tools, crisis path, basic pattern view.
pricing.plusSub: Personalization, extended trajectories, voice journal, clinician sharing.

patterns.title: Patterns
patterns.subtitle: Behavioral patterns detected from your check-ins
patterns.empty: No patterns detected yet — keep logging check-ins

privacy.headline: Privacy
privacy.body: Your data stays on your device unless you explicitly choose to share it. We do not sell data, run ads, or use behavioral fingerprinting.

safety.headline: Safety
safety.body: Discipline OS is not a crisis hotline replacement. If you are in immediate danger, use the crisis path or call your local emergency number.

journal.title: Journal
journal.subtitle: Your private space to reflect.
journal.emptyBody: Your entries are private and only visible to you. Start writing to track your journey.

checkIn.title: Check In
checkIn.pageSubtitle: How are you feeling right now?
checkIn.compassionBody: Recording how you feel is the first step. Would you like to try a coping tool?
checkIn.copingPrompt: Consider using a coping tool while you wait for the urge to pass.

tools.title: Coping Tools
tools.subtitle: Evidence-based techniques for managing urges.
tools.featuredDescription: A great first tool if you're new or unsure where to begin.

boxBreathing.name: Box Breathing
boxBreathing.description: A simple breathing pattern that calms the nervous system in minutes.

grounding54321.name: 5-4-3-2-1 Grounding
grounding54321.description: Anchor yourself to the present moment using your five senses.

pmr.name: Progressive Muscle Relaxation
pmr.description: Systematically release tension held in your body.

coldWater.name: Cold Water Reset
coldWater.description: Splashing cold water activates the dive reflex to slow your heart rate.

urgeSurfing.name: Urge Surfing
urgeSurfing.description: Observe the urge like a wave — it rises, peaks, and passes.

stopTechnique.name: STOP Technique
stopTechnique.description: Stop, Take a breath, Observe, Proceed mindfully.

compassionMeditation.name: Compassion Meditation
compassionMeditation.description: Direct kindness toward yourself during a difficult moment.

delayDistract.name: Delay & Distract
delayDistract.description: Commit to waiting 10 minutes — urges nearly always pass.

assessments.title: Assessments
assessments.subtitle: Validated questionnaires to track your mental health over time.
assessments.disclaimer: Scores are for self-monitoring only and not a diagnosis. Consult a healthcare professional.

auditC.name: AUDIT-C
auditC.fullName: Alcohol Use Disorders Identification Test – Consumption

session.thankYou: Thank you for completing this assessment.
session.safetyMessage: You mentioned thoughts of self-harm. You don't have to face this alone.
session.clinicalDisclaimer: This assessment is not a substitute for professional clinical evaluation.
session.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
session.answerRequired: Please select an answer before continuing.

descriptions.phq-9: Measures how often you have been bothered by depressive symptoms over the past two weeks.
descriptions.gad-7: Measures how often you have been bothered by anxiety symptoms over the past two weeks.
descriptions.who-5: Measures your general wellbeing over the past two weeks.
descriptions.audit-c: A brief screen for hazardous or harmful alcohol consumption.
descriptions.pss-10: Measures the degree to which situations in your life are perceived as stressful over the past month.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Your progress over time, by period
reports.empty: No reports yet — check back after your first assessment
reports.exportDescription: Download a FHIR R4 bundle for this period. Requires identity verification.

account.title: Account
account.emailReadOnly: Email is managed by your sign-in provider

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.pushDescription: Get notified when patterns are detected and during high-risk windows

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.downloadDescription: Export your check-ins, journal, and assessment history as JSON
privacy.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
privacy.deleteDialogBody: This will permanently delete your account, all check-ins, journal entries, assessment results, and usage history. This action cannot be undone.
privacy.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.
privacy.downloadErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
privacy.deleteErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.themeDescription: Choose between dark and light mode
